Türkçe

An Achievement Award to Assoc. Prof. Melis Behlil

The winners of the 5th International Women Filmmakers Festival Turkey achievement awards, organized by the Association of Women Directors under the direction of Gülten Taranç, with the contributions of İzmir Metropolitan Municipality, have been announced.

This year, “Sevin Okyay Cinematography Achievement Award” was given to Assoc. Prof. Melis Behlil, the Head of KHAS Radio, Television and Cinema Department.

The 5th International Women Filmmakers Festival Turkey will take place between February 27 and March 8, 2022 in Izmir and all over Turkey online. 98 films from 28 countries will be screened at the festival.

For detailed information:

www.kadinyonetmenlerfestivali.com.tr
